https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis._instruction: Enter the perpendicular distance between the parallel lines of the base of this parallelogram.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis.label: Base distance
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseDis.name: baseDistance

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseLen._instruction: Enter the uniform length of the bottom and top sides (the base) of this parallelogram.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseLen.label: Base length
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/baseLen.name: baseLength

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interio._instruction: Enter an interior angle between the base and an adjacent side of this parallelogram.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interio.label: Interior angle
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/interio.name: interiorAngle
